title: Break Glass
description: Access a user's personal audit logs with mandatory justification. All access is recorded and the user is notified.
reasonPlaceholder: Describe the incident or reason for accessing this user's personal logs (minimum 10 characters)
warning: This action will be recorded and the target user will be notified.
grantCreated: Access granted. Grant expires in 24 hours.
revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this grant?
selfAccessError: You cannot create a break-glass grant for yourself.
duplicateGrantError: An active grant already exists for this user.
reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 10 characters.
rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.
